message: chore: sync poltergeist wrapper and metadata

files.patch:
@@ -69,7 +69,7 @@
     "generated_by": "poltergeist",
     "project_type": "mixed",
     "performance_profile": "balanced",
-    "generated_at": "2025-11-15T17:53:03.673Z",
+    "generated_at": "2025-11-15T22:44:40.129Z",
     "total_exclusions": 53
   }
-}
\ No newline at end of file
+}

@@ -1,12 +1,12 @@
 // This file is auto-generated by the build script. Do not edit manually.
 enum Version {
     static let current = "Peekaboo 3.0.0"
-    static let gitCommit = "988d8e80-dirty"
-    static let gitCommitDate = "2025-11-15 17:14:41 +0000"
-    static let gitBranch = "main"
-    static let buildDate = "2025-11-15T17:42:12+00:00"
-
+    static let gitCommit = "dff46441-dirty"
+    static let gitCommitDate = "2025-11-16 00:10:50 +0100"
+    static let gitBranch = "HEAD"
+    static let buildDate = "2025-11-16T00:11:18+01:00"
+    
     static var fullVersion: String {
-        "\(current) (\(gitBranch)/\(gitCommit), built: \(buildDate))"
+        return "\(current) (\(gitBranch)/\(gitCommit), built: \(buildDate))"
     }
 }

@@ -29,6 +29,19 @@ if [[ "$NEEDS_CONFIG" == "true" ]]; then
   set -- "$@" --config "$PROJECT_DIR/poltergeist.config.json"
 fi
 
+# Always run against the Peekaboo config (not the Poltergeist repo itself)
+CONFIG_PATH="$PROJECT_DIR/poltergeist.config.json"
+ADD_CONFIG_FLAG=true
+for arg in "$@"; do
+  case "$arg" in
+    -c|--config) ADD_CONFIG_FLAG=false ;;
+    --config=*) ADD_CONFIG_FLAG=false ;;
+  esac
+done
+if $ADD_CONFIG_FLAG; then
+  set -- "$@" --config "$CONFIG_PATH"
+fi
+
 # Run directly from TypeScript sources using tsx in the Poltergeist repo.
 if { [ "$1" = "panel" ] || { [ "$1" = "status" ] && [ "$2" = "panel" ]; }; }; then
   exec pnpm --dir "$POLTER_DIR" exec tsx --watch "$CLI_TS" "$@"
